calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-08-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Dupree in Propria Persona.

Mr. Dupree stated that there were no surviving relatives, that the Decedent was not married and that he was an only child of only children. In addition, he stated that he did a search by name in England, that both Parents were deceased, that he did not know the Mother's maiden name and that he knew the Decedent for the past 20 years. The Court granted the petition (signing the order for the same in open court). The will was admitted. No bond is required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
